title: Silky Floral Mediterranean Kabanos Salad
description: A vibrant, low‑calorie Mediterranean salad that pairs caramelized Polish kabanos with fresh herbs and a silky vinaigrette, perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat and sauté the sliced kabanos for 2–3 minutes until lightly browned, then set aside to cool slightly.
In a large bowl combine halved cherry tomatoes, diced cucumber, sliced red onion, Kalamata olives, and crumbled feta.
Whisk together the olive oil, red wine vinegar, chopped oregano, basil, salt, and pepper until emulsified.
Pour the dressing over the salad mixture and toss gently to coat all ingredients.
Add the warm kabanos slices to the salad and toss again so the flavors mingle.
Taste and adjust seasoning with salt or pepper as desired.
Let the salad rest for 5 minutes to allow the dressing to meld with the ingredients.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, optionally over a bed of mixed greens.
